subject: [Your Invite Inside]
body:
Mozination -

My new book 100M Money Models launches on Saturday, August 16th.

This is your official invitation

(If you're already registered, you're good).

Btw… I'm also giving away something huge to everyone who shows up - and it's better than an NFT but less than a Bitcoin…

But here's the catch:

You have to show up live to get it.

So I've done two things:

- I've made event registration quick and easy for you
- You're first in line to see all the awesome bonuses only available to those who pre-order.
- Reminder: I'm giving away the huge secret thing that's better than an NFT but less than a Bitcoin…but the only way you'll get it is by showing up live.

This huge thing I'm giving away free to everyone who shows up live is why it took me an extra year to launch 100M Money Models…but it'll be worth it.

That is all.

Alex

PS - Live at the launch, I will be randomly selecting 10 people who pre-order to spend a day with me in Vegas. To automatically enter the drawing (at no extra cost), simply...

Pre-order the book here
